# DISCOVER Source Pack v1.0

**Product:** DISCOVER — Healthcare Research & Innovation Leader Complete AI OS<br>
**Program ID:** `HRIL-AIOS-DISCOVER-COMPLETE-1.0`<br>
**Canonical source components:** 17

These 17 modular files are for human inspection, maintenance and hash comparison. Install from the complete one-file installer in `deliverables`. **Do not install individual source components.** Presence of these files proves neither target-Hermes installation nor S1/S2 success.
